descriptions: Pagliuso is listed as an ally of Iannazzo.
edges.evidence_quote: Alleati: ... Pagliuso

descriptions: Galatolo clan was subordinate to and allied with Madonia clan.
edges.evidence_quote: The Acquasanta family thus now answered to the Madonia clan, strong allies of the Galatolos.

descriptions: Madonia clan was a key ally of the Corleonesi.
edges.evidence_quote: Riina was backed by many of the allies he had spent the last decade gathering in the city, especially Francesco Madonia

descriptions: Bandidos prospect club member killed a Road Tramps member.
edges.evidence_quote: On 20 June 2015, Road Tramps member Andrew "Odd" O'Donoghue was shot dead by Alan "Cookie" McNamara, a member of the Caballeros – a Bandidos prospect club.

descriptions: Hells Angels disputed with Road Tramps over a motorcycle festival.
edges.evidence_quote: The Wolverhampton Hells Angels chapter became involved in a longrunning dispute with the Derby-based Road Tramps motorcycle gang over control of the 'Rock and Blues Custom show'.

descriptions: Lo Presti had ties with Mesiani Mazzacuva.
edges.evidence_quote: Ha avuto legami con tutte le più importanti famiglie mafiose della Calabria e della Sicilia . I Belfiore , i Tripodo , i Mesiani Mazzacuva, i Ruga , gli Aquino , gli Ierinò , i Macrì , i Morabito , i Varacalli , i Cataldo , gli Strangio , i Barbaro , gli Alvaro , i Palamara , i Raso-Albanese e i Facchineri .

descriptions: The Albanese are allies of the Raso-Gullace.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono alleati dei Raso-Gullace.

descriptions: Satan's Angels MC merged with Hells Angels in 1983.
edges.evidence_quote: The Satan's Angels MC in Vancouver had a black member when it merged with the Hells Angels in 1983.

descriptions: Dojin-kai is allied with Kumamoto-kai as per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Kudo-kai, Sinaloa cartel, Taishu-kai, Kumamoto-kai)

descriptions: Kudo-kai and Kumamoto-kai are both members of the Yonsha-kai federation.
edges.evidence_quote: The Kudo-kai is a member of an anti-Yamaguchi fraternal federation, the Yonsha-kai, with three other northern-Kyushu based organizations, the Taishu-kai , Dojin-kai , and Kumamoto-kai.

descriptions: Kumamoto-kai is part of a federation that opposes the Yamaguchi-gumi, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: The Taishu-kai is a member of an anti-Yamaguchi-gumi fraternal federation, the "Yonsha-kai", along with the ... Kumamoto -based Kumamoto-kai.

descriptions: Taishu-kai and Kumamoto-kai are both members of the Yonsha-kai federation, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: The Taishu-kai is a member of an anti-Yamaguchi-gumi fraternal federation, the "Yonsha-kai", along with the Kitakyushu -based Kudo-kai , the Kurume -based Dojin-kai and the Kumamoto -based Kumamoto-kai.

descriptions: Husayniyun is listed as an opponent of Islamic State.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: ... Husayniyun/Hüseynçilər

descriptions: Somali Outlaws and Hot Boyz are rivals.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Hot Boyz , Madhiban With Attitude , 1627 Boys

Jheri Curls.description: The Jheri Curls were a Dominican gang active in Washington Heights, Manhattan, New York City in the early 1990s. Named after the Jheri curl hairstyle, they ran a major cocaine trafficking operation based out of an apartment complex on W. 157th St. and Riverside Drive. Led by Rafael Martinez and his brothers, the gang was known for extreme violence, including the murder of a resident who cooperated with police. The gang was dismantled in October 1991 after undercover police operations led to arrests and lengthy prison sentences.

descriptions: The Aprea-Cuccaro clan supports the D'Atri faction.
edges.evidence_quote: And through contacts with the local criminals, would have taken control of illicit affairs in the area, supporting the D'Atri faction, a small criminal group already inserted in the underworld of Somma Vesuviana.

descriptions: Clan Mariano survivors allied with Terracciano.
edges.evidence_quote: I superstiti del clan starebbero tentando di riorganizzarsi intorno al fratello dello storico capo dei Picuozzi, unendosi in alleanza con i clan degli Esposito, dei Lepre della zona del Cavone e degli Elia del Pallonetto di Santa Lucia, a questo sodalizio si sarebbe unito anche il clan di Salvatore Terracciano (detto o'Nirone) dei Quartieri Spagnoli, storico affiliato dei Picuozzi.

descriptions: The Rocks Push fought with the Glebe Push.
edges.evidence_quote: The gang was engaged in running warfare with other larrikin gangs of the time such as the Miller's Point Push, Straw Hat Push, the Glebe Push, the Argyle Cut Push, the Forty Thieves from Surry Hills, and the Gibb Street Mob.

descriptions: Devil Cobra MC Moosburg merged into Trust MC in 1984.
edges.evidence_quote: In early 1984 the MCs MC Ergoldsbach (founded 1982), the Devil Cobra MC Moosburg, the Free Fighters MC Erding, the Ranger MC Neutraubling and some members of the Destroyer MCs Landshut merged to form the Trust MC Germany.

descriptions: Confederate Angels president introduced an informant to Hells Angels, indicating a cooperative relationship.
edges.evidence_quote: Robert "Hoss" Hall, president of the Richmond, Virginia -based Confederate Angels Motorcycle Club.

Real Irish Republican Army.description: Dissident Irish republican paramilitary group formed in 1997 after a split from the Provisional IRA, aiming to create a united Ireland. It waged a campaign in Northern Ireland against British security forces and carried out bombings, most notably the 1998 Omagh bombing. The group merged into the New IRA in 2012, though some remnants remain active.

descriptions: The Hutch gang is allied with the Real Irish Republican Army.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Keane-Collopy Gang , McCarthy-Dundon Gang , RIRA , New IRA

descriptions: The Real IRA is listed as a rival of the Kinahan Organised Crime Group in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Real IRA

descriptions: New IRA is a continuation of Real IRA after merger with RAAD.
edges.evidence_quote: It is a continuation of the Real Irish Republican Army (Real IRA), which began to be called the 'New IRA' in July 2012 when Republican Action Against Drugs (RAAD) and other small republican militant groups merged with it.

descriptions: The Real IRA is a splinter group that split from the Provisional IRA.
edges.evidence_quote: Several splinter groups have been formed as a result of splits within the IRA, including the Continuity IRA , which is still active in the dissident Irish republican campaign , and the Real IRA .

descriptions: The Real IRA was formed by defectors from the Provisional IRA.
edges.evidence_quote: The Real IRA was formed in November 1997 when senior Provisional IRA members, including quartermaster-general Michael McKevitt, resigned over acceptance of the Mitchell Principles.

descriptions: The 32 County Sovereignty Movement is the political wing of the Real IRA.
edges.evidence_quote: Bernadette Sands McKevitt, sister of hunger striker Bobby Sands and a founder of the RIRA's political wing, the 32 County Sovereignty Movement

descriptions: The 32 County Sovereignty Movement is a political wing of the Real IRA.
edges.evidence_quote: The RIRA also has political wings: the 32 County Sovereignty Movement (formerly the 32 County Sovereignty Committee), led by Francis Mackey, and unregistered political party Saoradh, led by Brian Kenna.

descriptions: The Real IRA and Continuity IRA have cooperated at a local level.
edges.evidence_quote: The RIRA is distinct from the Continuity IRA, another Provisional IRA splinter group founded in 1986, although the two groups have been known to co-operate at a local level.

descriptions: The Real IRA merged with RAAD and other groups to form the New IRA.
edges.evidence_quote: RAAD, 'the IRA', and some smaller groups merged with the Real IRA in 2012 to form the New IRA.

descriptions: The Real IRA merged with RAAD and other groups to form the New IRA in July 2012.
edges.evidence_quote: In July 2012, it was reported that Republican Action Against Drugs (RAAD) and other small republican militant groups were merging with the Real IRA. This new entity was named the New IRA by the media

descriptions: The Provisional IRA has been hostile to the Real IRA, issuing threats and allegedly killing a member.
edges.evidence_quote: The Provisional IRA has been hostile to the RIRA and issued threats to RIRA members, and in October 2000 was alleged to be responsible for the fatal shooting of Belfast RIRA member Joe O'Connor according to O'Connor's family and 32 County Sovereignty Movement member Marian Price.

descriptions: Óglaigh na hÉireann included a faction that splintered from the Real IRA.
edges.evidence_quote: This group also included former members of the Irish National Liberation Army and a faction that splintered from the Real IRA.

descriptions: The Real IRA split from the Provisional IRA in 1997.
edges.evidence_quote: It was formed in 1997 following a split in the Provisional IRA by dissident members, who rejected the IRA's ceasefire that year.

descriptions: RAAD merged with the Real IRA to form the New IRA.
edges.evidence_quote: RAAD, 'the IRA', and some smaller groups merged with the Real IRA in 2012 to form the New IRA.

descriptions: The Real IRA merged with RAAD in July 2012.
edges.evidence_quote: In July 2012, it was reported that Republican Action Against Drugs (RAAD) and other small republican militant groups were merging with the Real IRA.

descriptions: RAAD merged with the Real IRA in 2012.
edges.evidence_quote: On 26 July 2012, it was reported that Republican Action Against Drugs (RAAD) and other small republican militant groups were merging with the Real IRA.

descriptions: Saoradh is a political wing of the Real IRA.
edges.evidence_quote: The RIRA also has political wings: the 32 County Sovereignty Movement (formerly the 32 County Sovereignty Committee), led by Francis Mackey, and unregistered political party Saoradh, led by Brian Kenna.

descriptions: ISHP is an official affiliate of IS.
edges.evidence_quote: Islamic State – Hind Province (ISHP) is the Indian branch of IS and operates in Indian Jammu and Kashmir. Its formation was announced in 2019.

Camorra.description: The Camorra is an Italian Mafia-type criminal organization originating in Campania, dating to the 18th century. It is structured into individual clans, each led by a boss, and engages primarily in drug trafficking, racketeering, counterfeiting, and money laundering. The organization has a strong presence in other European countries, especially Spain, and maintains close ties with South American drug cartels. As of 2023, powerful groups include the Mazzarella clan and the Secondigliano Alliance.

descriptions: The 'Ndrangheta established contacts with the Camorra through cigarette smuggling.
edges.evidence_quote: Their involvement in cigarette smuggling expanded their reach and facilitated contacts with the Sicilian Mafia and the Neapolitan Camorra.

descriptions: 'Ndrangheta has stipulated various alliances with Camorra for business management.
edges.evidence_quote: ha stipulato nel corso della storia varie alleanze per la gestione degli affari

descriptions: The text states 'Ndrangheta has relationships with all Italian mafias, including Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: Ha avuto e ha rapporti con tutte le mafie italiane : Cosa nostra , Camorra , Banda della Magliana , Sacra Corona Unita , Basilischi .

descriptions: Bellocco helped set up SCU to counter Camorra, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: to counter the growing influence of the Camorra

descriptions: Bruzzaniti (as part of Morabito-Bruzzaniti-Palamara) trafficked drugs with the Casalesi Camorra clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Inoltre trafficavano in droga con la cosca camorrista dei casalesi.

descriptions: Bruzzaniti, Palamara, and Morabito trafficked drugs with the Casalesi Camorra clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Inoltre trafficavano in droga con la cosca camorristica dei casalesi .

descriptions: The De Stefano 'ndrina was allied with a boss of the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: Era alleato con i boss delle altre organizzazioni criminali italiane, come Leoluca Bagarella e Nitto Santapaola della mafia siciliana, e Raffaele Cutolo della camorra.

descriptions: De Stefano had joint ventures with Camorra boss Cutolo.
edges.evidence_quote: the De Stefanos were the representation of the manager-criminal controlling a crime multinational with joint ventures with Raffaele Cutolo from the Camorra

descriptions: Morabito (as part of Morabito-Bruzzaniti-Palamara) trafficked drugs with the Casalesi Camorra clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Inoltre trafficavano in droga con la cosca camorrista dei casalesi.

descriptions: Morabito, Palamara, and Bruzzaniti trafficked drugs with the Casalesi Camorra clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Inoltre trafficavano in droga con la cosca camorristica dei casalesi .

descriptions: Palamara (as part of Morabito-Bruzzaniti-Palamara) trafficked drugs with the Casalesi Camorra clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Inoltre trafficavano in droga con la cosca camorrista dei casalesi.

descriptions: Palamara, Morabito, and Bruzzaniti trafficked drugs with the Casalesi Camorra clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Inoltre trafficavano in droga con la cosca camorristica dei casalesi .

descriptions: The Camorra assassinated the head of the Morello gang.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1916 the Camorra had assassinated Nicholas Morello, head of the Morello gang.

descriptions: Morello initially allied with Gallucci (Camorra) but later fought the Camorra in the Mafia-Camorra War.
edges.evidence_quote: The Morellos had an alliance with Giosue Gallucci, a prominent East Harlem businessman and Camorrista ... The fight over Gallucci's rackets became known as the Mafia-Camorra War.

descriptions: The American Mafia cooperates with the Camorra in criminal activities.
edges.evidence_quote: Today, the Italian-American Mafia cooperates in various criminal activities with Italian organized crime groups, such as the Sicilian Mafia, the Camorra of Campania and the 'Ndrangheta of Calabria.

descriptions: American Mafia cooperates with Camorra in criminal activities.
edges.evidence_quote: Today, the Italian-American Mafia cooperates in various criminal activities with Italian organized crime groups, such as the Sicilian Mafia, the Camorra of Campania and the 'Ndrangheta of Calabria.

descriptions: American Mafia has links with Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: The American Mafia, in addition to having links with organized crime groups in Italy such as the Camorra, the 'Ndrangheta, Sacra Corona Unita and Sicilian Mafia

descriptions: Both are Italian organized crime groups involved in heroin trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Italian organized crime groups, in particular the Sicilian Mafia and the Camorra, have been involved in heroin trafficking for decades.

descriptions: The American Mafia cooperates with the Camorra in criminal activities.
edges.evidence_quote: Hoy, la mafia estadounidense coopera en varias actividades criminales con los grupos de crimen organizado italianos, tales como la mafia siciliana, la Camorra de la Campania y la 'Ndrangheta de Calabria.

descriptions: Italian-American Mafia has strong ties with Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: la mafia italo-americana ha potuto contare su solidi legami con i gruppi della criminalità organizzata in Italia , come Cosa nostra , la Camorra e la 'Ndrangheta

descriptions: The American Mafia absorbed or merged with the American Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: finalmente absorbió o se fusionó con otros grupos criminales o de gánsters de origen italiano formados en los Estados Unidos (como los miembros de la Camorra estadounidense)

descriptions: The text compares Cosa Nostra and Camorra as Italian mafia organizations, noting Camorra is historically older.
edges.evidence_quote: Inizialmente, con il termine Mafia spesso ci si riferiva a Cosa Nostra , anche se storicamente si ritiene che la prima organizzazione mafiosa italiana sia la Camorra .

descriptions: The text lists 'Ndrangheta, Cosa Nostra, and Camorra as traditional organizations, but does not assert a relationship between them.
edges.evidence_quote: infatti le organizzazioni di tradizione secolare sono la 'ndrangheta , Cosa nostra , e la camorra

descriptions: Listed together as traditional mafias, but no specific relationship stated.
edges.evidence_quote: le organizzazioni di tradizione secolare sono la 'ndrangheta , Cosa nostra , e la camorra

descriptions: The Italian government claimed the Banda della Magliana was closely allied with Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: The Italian government claimed that the Banda della Magliana was closely allied with and tied to other criminal organizations, such as Cosa Nostra, Camorra, and 'Ndrangheta.

descriptions: The infobox lists Camorra as an ally of the Banda della Magliana.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: NAR, Sicilian Mafia, Camorra

descriptions: Banda della Magliana was tied to Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: The organization was tied to other Italian criminal organizations such as the Cosa Nostra, Camorra and the 'Ndrangheta.

descriptions: The Banda della Magliana established contacts with the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: col tempo la banda estese la propria rete di contatti alle principali organizzazioni criminali italiane, da Cosa nostra alla camorra

descriptions: Claudio Sicilia revealed contacts between Banda della Magliana and the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: Sicilia è anche il primo a parlare dei contatti della Banda con la camorra di Lorenzo Nuvoletta e Michele Zaza

descriptions: Marcello Colafigli, a Banda della Magliana member, maintained contacts with Camorra for drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: mantenendo rapporti con esponenti della 'ndrangheta , della camorra , della mafia foggiana e con albanesi inseriti in un cartello narcos sudamericano

descriptions: Banda della Magliana had close ties with the three southern mafias, including Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: la cosiddetta Banda della Magliana, che ebbe stretti legami con le tre mafie meridionali

descriptions: Cali Cartel allied with Camorra for cocaine distribution in Europe.
edges.evidence_quote: the Cali cartel established a strategic alliance with the powerful Camorra criminal organization. Cali supplied the cocaine and the Camorra handled distribution across Europe.

descriptions: Cartel de Cali supplied cocaine to the Camorra for distribution in Europe.
edges.evidence_quote: Cali suministró la cocaína y la Camorra se encargó de la distribución en Europa.

descriptions: The Camorra and 'Ndrangheta were involved together in an international drug network.
edges.evidence_quote: In June 2019 the operation Spaghetti Connection dismantled an international drug network involving the Camorra and the 'Ndrangheta in Abidjan and Tabou.

descriptions: Camorra and 'Ndrangheta have alliances.
edges.evidence_quote: According to the media, there have always been alliances between the Camorra and the 'Ndrangheta members.

descriptions: Camorra allegedly provided safe houses, forged documents, firearms, and explosives to Al-Qaeda in exchange for narcotics.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2005, it was alleged the Camorra created safe houses, forged documents, firearms, and explosives to Al-Qaeda in return for narcotics, which are brought into Italy via the Adriatic Sea.

descriptions: The Scissionisti di Secondigliano is a subgroup of the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: The Camorra's organizational structure is divided into individual groups called 'clans'.

descriptions: Scissionisti di Secondigliano is a Camorra clan in contact with Albanian mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: Dalla seconda relazione semestrale del 2010 della DIA vengono illustrati contatti tra la mafia albanese e il clan Mazzarella, con gli Scissionisti di Secondigliano e il clan Serino di Sarno.

descriptions: Camorra clans have lasting relationships with Cosa Nostra.
edges.evidence_quote: Several Camorra clans have lasting relationships with the Cosa Nostra .

descriptions: Sicilian Mafia convinced Camorra to cooperate in drug smuggling.
edges.evidence_quote: In the 1970s, the Sicilian Mafia convinced the Camorra to convert their cigarette smuggling routes into drug smuggling routes.

descriptions: Camorra collaborates with Italian-American Mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: These Italian crime groups frequently collaborate with the Italian-American Mafia, which is itself an offshoot of the Sicilian Mafia.

descriptions: Cosa Nostra members were forced to reside in Campania, strengthening operational ties with Camorra clans.
edges.evidence_quote: Il soggiorno obbligato di esponenti di Cosa nostra in Campania consolidò legami operativi con camorristi napoletani e casertani, tra cui Zaza, Nuvoletta e Bardellino.

descriptions: Camorra clans allied with Sicilian mafiosi to defeat the foreign competition of the Clan des Marseillais.
edges.evidence_quote: i clan camorristici, in combutta con i mafiosi siciliani, riuscirono a sbaragliare la concorrenza straniera del clan dei marsigliesi

descriptions: Camorra has relationships with the Banda della Magliana.
edges.evidence_quote: La camorra intrattiene rapporti con le associazioni mafiose operanti nella capitale, quali la Banda della Magliana

descriptions: Honoured Society allied with Bogota Cartel from 2000 to 2010.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Bogota Cartel (2000 - 2010)

descriptions: Calabrese Family was absorbed by Honoured Society since early 2000s.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Calabrese Family (since the beginning of the 2000s absorbed by Honoured Society)

descriptions: Zaza is a Camorra clan leader who strengthened ties with the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: La camorra sfrutta la città come base strategica e rafforza i legami con esponenti della criminalità locale, come Michele Zaza

edges.evidence_quote: The Camorra's organizational structure is divided into individual groups called 'clans'.

descriptions: The Casalesi are a Camorra clan that maintained a centralized structure.

edges.evidence_quote: The Camorra's organizational structure is divided into individual groups called 'clans'.

descriptions: Giuliano clan is a constituent clan of the Camorra.

descriptions: The Licciardi clan is a subgroup of the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: The Camorra's organizational structure is divided into individual groups called 'clans'.

descriptions: Licciardi clan is one of the clans holding real power within the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: According to Misso, the real power of the organization is now in the hands of the Licciardi clan, Mallardo clan, Moccia clan and Contini clan.

descriptions: The Licciardi are a Camorra clan that opposed the NCO.
edges.evidence_quote: A Secondigliano, il gruppo Licciardi si collocò tra i protagonisti destinati a contare nella contrapposizione alla NCO

descriptions: The Mazzarella clan is a powerful group within the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: the most powerful groups of the Camorra in the present day are the Mazzarella clan and the Secondigliano Alliance

descriptions: The Mazzarella clan is a subgroup of the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: The Camorra's organizational structure is divided into individual groups called 'clans'.

descriptions: Mazzarella clan is a Camorra clan.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1992, Ciro Mazzarella , the late boss of the Mazzarella clan , decided to move to Switzerland, after losing a war between Camorra clans in Naples.

descriptions: Mazzarella clan is a powerful organization within the Camorra, dominating territory and having groups under its influence.
edges.evidence_quote: According to the reports of the DIA about the Camorra, the Mazzarella clan, despite the bloody war against the Rinaldi clan, is still one of the most powerful organizations in Campania, dominating the territory in various neighbourhoods, and having numerous groups under their influence, as the Ferraiuolo clan.

descriptions: Mazzarella clan is a constituent clan of the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: the Mazzarella clan, from San Giovanni a Teduccio, named after the Mazzarella family;

descriptions: Nuvoletta clan is a constituent clan of the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: Examples include the Nuvoletta clan, from Marano di Napoli, named after the Nuvoletta brothers: Lorenzo, Angelo and Ciro;

descriptions: The Nuvoletta are a Camorra clan strongly tied to Cosa Nostra.
edges.evidence_quote: Il clan Nuvoletta di Marano, fortemente intrecciato con Cosa nostra, consolidò un profilo di potere

edges.evidence_quote: The Camorra's organizational structure is divided into individual groups called 'clans'.

descriptions: Contini clan is a Camorra clan.

descriptions: Contini clan is one of the clans holding real power within the Camorra.

descriptions: Camorra may be in alliance with Islamic State for drug distribution.

edges.evidence_quote: The Camorra's organizational structure is divided into individual groups called 'clans'.

descriptions: Lo Russo clan is a Camorra clan.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2017, assets worth €20 million belonging to the Potenza brothers, who are considered to be linked to the Lo Russo clan , were seized in Lugano, including bank accounts in BSI .

descriptions: Mallardo clan is one of the clans holding real power within the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: According to Misso, the real power of the organization is now in the hands of the Licciardi clan, Mallardo clan, Moccia clan and Contini clan.

descriptions: Mallardo clan is a constituent clan of the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: the Mallardo clan, from Giugliano in Campania, named after Francesco Mallardo, among others.

descriptions: The Mallardo are a Camorra clan that established territorial control in the 1970s.
edges.evidence_quote: Nell'area di Giugliano si affermarono i Mallardo con capacità di controllo territoriale che risalgono proprio a questo decennio.

descriptions: Moccia clan is one of the clans holding real power within the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: According to Misso, the real power of the organization is now in the hands of the Licciardi clan, Mallardo clan, Moccia clan and Contini clan.

descriptions: Moccia clan is a constituent clan of the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: the Moccia clan, from Afragola, named after Gennaro Moccia;

descriptions: Camorra rivaled the Morello crime family in New York City.
edges.evidence_quote: They rivaled the now defunct Morello crime family for power in New York City.

descriptions: The New Organized Camorra was an attempt to unify Camorra families, but it was unsuccessful.
edges.evidence_quote: Raffaele Cutolo made an unsuccessful attempt to unify the Camorra families ... by forming the New Organized Camorra

descriptions: Nuova Camorra Organizzata is a Camorra organization led by Raffaele Cutolo.
edges.evidence_quote: On 26 August 1976, Domenico Tripodo , a powerful 'Ndrangheta boss of the time, was stabbed to death in prison on the request of the De Stefano 'ndrina , and with the help of Camorra boss Raffaele Cutolo , the boss of the Nuova Camorra Organizzata (NCO) who worked with the De Stefano's in drug trafficking.

descriptions: The NCO was a Camorra organization founded by Cutolo as a response to Sicilian dominance.
edges.evidence_quote: Raffaele Cutolo, che nella seconda metà del decennio strutturò la Nuova Camorra Organizzata (NCO) come risposta “campana” al predominio siciliano nel contrabbando

descriptions: Nuova Grande Camorra Pugliese was founded by a Camorra member to expand Camorra operations.
edges.evidence_quote: The SCU was founded in the late 1970s as the Nuova Grande Camorra Pugliese, based in Foggia, by the Camorra member Raffaele Cutolo, who wanted to expand his operations into Apulia.

descriptions: The NMC was a Camorra organization founded by Alfieri to centralize the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel 1992, Carmine Alfieri tentò di strutturare la Camorra campana in modo più centralizzato, ... Fondò la Nuova Mafia Campana (NMC)

descriptions: The Polverino clan is a subgroup of the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: The Camorra's organizational structure is divided into individual groups called 'clans'.

descriptions: Polverino clan is a Camorra clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Also in 2019, relatives of top members belonging to the Polverino clan claim three million euros to the Spanish State of compensation after their relatives were acquitted by the National Court of the crime of money laundering for which they were arrested in 2013 and tried in 2016.

descriptions: The Puca clan is a subgroup of the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: The Camorra's organizational structure is divided into individual groups called 'clans'.

descriptions: The Camorra gave stewardship of Castel Volturno to the Rapaces, a Nigerian criminal group.
edges.evidence_quote: the first town in which the Camorra sanctioned stewardship by a foreign clan was Castel Volturno, which was given to the Rapaces

descriptions: Sacra Corona Unita was originally founded as a subgroup of the Nuova Camorra Organizzata (Camorra).
edges.evidence_quote: In 1981, Raffaele Cutolo , entrusted Pino Iannelli and Alessandro Fusco the task of founding an organization in Apulia to be directly controlled by the Nuova Camorra Organizzata , the organization was named Nuova Camorra Pugliese, later called Sacra Corona Unita .

descriptions: The Secondigliano Alliance is a powerful group within the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: the most powerful groups of the Camorra in the present day are the Mazzarella clan and the Secondigliano Alliance

descriptions: Secondigliano Alliance is one of the most powerful clans within the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: According to numerous 2019 reports, the most powerful clans of the Camorra are the Secondigliano Alliance and the Mazzarella clan.

descriptions: The Camorra and Sicilian Mafia jointly operated a money laundering scheme.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1993, the Camorra and the Sicilian Mafia were accused of running a $1.5 billion operation to launder drug money through banks, insurance companies, hotels and casinos in Italy and on the French Riviera, arresting 36 suspects.

descriptions: Camorra's Gionta clan allied with Società foggiana in drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: In September 2019, the Italian police dismantled an international drug trafficking alliance between the powerful Gionta clan of the Camorra, the Società foggiana , also known as the fifth-mafia, and Moroccan drug traffickers.

descriptions: Sorianiello is a Camorra group involved in conflict with Nigerian individuals.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 26 aprile 2021 sono stati arrestati 5 soggetti ritenuti appartenenti al gruppo camorristico "Sorianiello"

descriptions: Honoured Society and Carlton Crew have close cooperation from mid-1990s to present.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Carlton Crew (close cooperation from the mid-1990s to the present)

descriptions: The Ercolano faction of the Catania Mafia family cooperated with Camorra groups.
edges.evidence_quote: often operating in tandem with powerful Camorra groups.

descriptions: Clan Cappello had business dealings with the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: Cappello era entrato in affari con la camorra di Carmine Alfieri.

descriptions: The Camorra Casalesi clan is a sub-group of the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: The Camorra Casalesi clan rose in the 1980s, gaining control of large areas of the local economy 'partly by manipulating politicians and intimidating judges'.

descriptions: The Casalesi clan is a Camorra clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Antonio Bardellino ... was a powerful Camorrista and boss of the Casalesi clan

descriptions: The Casalesi clan is a constituent part of the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: The Casalesi clan is a clan within the Camorra

descriptions: The Casalesi clan is a clan within the Camorra organization.
edges.evidence_quote: The Spartacus Trial ... was a series of criminal trials, each specifically directed against the activities of the powerful Casalesi clan of the Camorra.

descriptions: Casamonica clan allied with Camorra members.
edges.evidence_quote: On 11 May 2016, a criminal alliance between the Sinti criminal organization Casamonica clan , members of the Camorra, and affiliates from the 'Ndrangheta 's of Polistena , Taurianova and Melicucco was dismantled by the police.

descriptions: Camorra is listed as an ally of Casamonica clan in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Banda della Magliana, 'Ndrangheta, Camorra

descriptions: Casamonica clan inherited contacts with Camorra from Banda della Magliana.
edges.evidence_quote: With the dismantling of the Banda della Magliana, the Clan increased its criminal power by inheriting its criminal dealings and contacts with Camorra and 'Ndrangheta.

descriptions: The Casamonica clan interacted with the Camorra through the mediation of boss Raffaele Cutolo.
edges.evidence_quote: la mediazione del boss camorrista Raffaele Cutolo dal carcere

descriptions: The Casamonica clan was part of a criminal organization that included members of the Camorra and 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: L'11 maggio 2016 viene sgominata a Roma una organizzazione criminale tra elementi criminali di etnia rom abruzzese, il clan dei Casamonica, esponenti della camorra e delle 'ndrine di Polistena , Taurianova e del locale di Melicucco .

descriptions: Di Lauro clan is a constituent part of the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: The Di Lauro clan is an Italian crime clan, part of the Camorra in Naples.

descriptions: The Fabbrocino clan is a part of the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: Mario Fabbrocino was a powerful Italian crime boss of the Camorra – the Neapolitan mafia.

descriptions: The Matrone clan is a part of the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: Matrone was at the head of the Loreto-Matrone clan of the Camorra

descriptions: The Mazzarella clan is a Camorra organization.
edges.evidence_quote: Il clan Mazzarella è un sodalizio camorristico criminale operante in diversi quartieri di Napoli.

descriptions: The clan is linked to the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: Il clan Vangone-Limelli è un sodalizio criminale legato alla camorra

descriptions: A Corbi family member murdered a reputed Camorra member.
edges.evidence_quote: Patsy Corbi was sentenced to life imprisonment for the murder of local barber Frank Naples, a reputed Camorra member.

descriptions: Leggio associated with Lorenzo Nuvoletta, head of a Camorra clan that was also a Cosa Nostra branch.
edges.evidence_quote: Another "Milanese" associate of Leggio was Lorenzo Nuvoletta , who was the head of a mafia family operating in the Naples area, as a Camorra clan, but which was also a local branch of Cosa Nostra, Lorenzo and his brothers being "punciuti", that is, official members of the Sicilian Mafia.

descriptions: Camorra is listed as an ally of CJNG in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Milenio Cartel , Juárez Cartel , La Línea (gang) , Caborca Cartel , Gulf Cartel , Primeiro Comando da Capital , MS-13 , Clan del Golfo , Popular Liberation Army , FARC-EP , 'Ndrangheta , Guerreros Unidos , Camorra , Nuestra Familia

descriptions: D'Aquila fought against the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1916 the Camorra had assassinated Nicholas Morello, head of the Morello gang. In response, D'Aquila allied with the Morellos to fight the Camorra.

descriptions: Camorra is an ally of the Gulf Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Camorra

descriptions: The Camorra is listed as an ally of the Kinahan Organised Crime Group in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Camorra

descriptions: Mala del Brenta facilitated collaboration between southern mafias, including Camorra, and local crime.
edges.evidence_quote: favorirono la collaborazione tra le mafie meridionali e la piccola criminalità locale

descriptions: Mala del Brenta had business relationships with various Camorra families.
edges.evidence_quote: venivano accertati frequenti “rapporti d'affari” con esponenti della Camorra , appartenenti alla famiglia Guida, più recentemente a quella dei Giuliano , al Clan Fidanzati e alla Famiglia Ciulla

descriptions: The Morello family fought the Camorra in the Mafia–Camorra War.
edges.evidence_quote: Gaetano "Tommaso/Thomas" Lo Monte took control of the policy game in Harlem but murdered on October 13, 1915. Nicholo Morello took over and became embroiled in the Mafia-Camorra War . This conflict was between the Sicilian Morello-Terranova family and Brooklyn Camorra gangs led by Pellegrino Morano .

descriptions: The Morello family defeated the Camorra in a conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: The Morellos were based in Manhattan 's Italian Harlem and eventually gained dominance in the Italian underworld by defeating the rival Neapolitan Camorra of Brooklyn .

descriptions: NCO tried to impose control over all illegal activities in the Naples area, leading to a war with other Camorra clans.
edges.evidence_quote: la NCO pretese di imporre il suo controllo su tutte le attività illecite nel napoletano e ciò determinò una guerra

descriptions: NCO's rituals were inspired by the Bella Società Riformata.
edges.evidence_quote: Cutolo si ispirò, inizialmente, ai rituali della Bella Società Riformata

descriptions: Camorra members operate as associates of Nuova Mala del Brenta.
edges.evidence_quote: Its members are exclusively native to the Veneto region, but with a number of associates operating in the region from Cosa Nostra, Camorra and it is believed from the Ndrangheta as well.

descriptions: The Renzvillo crime family formed alliances with Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: The Renzvillo mafia family has allegedly set up alliances with the 'Ndrangheta and Camorra.

descriptions: Infobox lists Camorra as an ally of Sacra Corona Unita.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: 'Ndrangheta, Camorra, Società foggiana, Albanian mafia, Serbian mafia, Montenegrin mafia, Corsican mafia, Romanian Mafia

descriptions: SCU incorporated Camorra traditions under Rogoli's leadership.
edges.evidence_quote: Under his leadership the SCU mixed its Apulian interests and opportunities with 'Ndrangheta and Camorra traditions.

descriptions: Camorra members were sent to Apulia, but no direct relationship with SCU is stated.
edges.evidence_quote: A partire dagli anni Cinquanta, la Puglia, come altre regioni d'Italia, fu scelta come zona dove inviare al soggiorno obbligato pericolosi criminali appartenenti a Cosa nostra, alla 'Ndrangheta e alla Camorra.

descriptions: Bontade of the Santa Maria di Gesù Family established a link with a Camorra clan, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: Bontade, for instance, linked up with Giuseppe Sciorio of the Maisto clan of the Camorra, who would be initiated in Cosa Nostra.

descriptions: Cosa Nostra has had cooperative relationships with various Camorra clans in smuggling and drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Vari clan di Camorra hanno intrattenuto rapporti, più o meno duraturi, con Cosa nostra, soprattutto nel campo del contrabbando di sigarette e del traffico di stupefacenti.

descriptions: Camorra was part of a collaboration with Russian mafia and Cosa Nostra.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel 2008 viene formalizzata la collaborazione fra mafia russa e Cosa nostra, 'ndrangheta e camorra.

descriptions: Società foggiana broke ties with Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel giro di pochi anni tuttavia l'organizzazione criminale foggiana si libera dei vincoli con la camorra

descriptions: Società foggiana has deep relations with Camorra, particularly Nuova Camorra Organizzata.
edges.evidence_quote: The relations between the Foggia delinquency and the Camorra are probably the oldest and deepest ones. The Foggia delinquency has managed to make the qualitative leap thanks to the Camorra, particularly the Nuova Camorra Organizzata ;

descriptions: Società Foggiana has deep historical relations with Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: The relations between the Foggia delinquency and the Camorra are probably the oldest and deepest ones.

descriptions: Società foggiana has agreements with Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: ha trovato accordi con organizzazioni criminali come la mafia siciliana , la camorra e la 'ndrangheta

descriptions: Long-standing and deep ties between Società foggiana and Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: I rapporti tra camorra e delinquenza foggiana sono, probabilmente, quelli di più antica data e quelli più profondi.

descriptions: Stidda is allied with Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: 'Ndrangheta, Camorra, Cosa Nostra

descriptions: Stidda established important relations with the Neapolitan Camorra for drug supplies.
edges.evidence_quote: le recenti operazioni di polizia hanno dimostrato che il clan gelese della Stidda ha stabilito importanti relazioni con il clan Cappello di Catania e con la camorra napoletana per imponenti forniture di cocaina , marijuana e hashish

descriptions: Infobox lists Camorra as an ally of Sun Yee On.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Wo Hop To, Wo On Lok, Albanian mafia, Camorra, Serbian mafia, American Mafia, Sinaloa Cartel

descriptions: The Carlton Crew became allies with the Honoured Society since the mid-90s.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Honoured Society and Calabrese Family (since the mid-90s)

descriptions: El infobox lista a la Camorra como aliada del Tren de Aragua.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: Camorra

descriptions: Turatello Crew was allied with Camorra (Nuova Camorra Organizzata).
edges.evidence_quote: As the leader of the so-called Turatello Crew, Francis Turatello was a protégé of the Sicilian Mafia and an important ally in Milan, for both the Sicilian Mafia and Nuova Camorra Organizzata.

descriptions: Zemun clan member worked for the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: In Italy he became a leading heroin distributor and professional hitman, working for the Camorra in Naples

descriptions: The PKK cooperated with DK as part of the Peoples' United Revolutionary Movement.
edges.evidence_quote: In March 2016, the PKK helped to launch the Peoples' United Revolutionary Movement with nine other Kurdish and Turkish revolutionary leftist, socialist and communist groups (including the TKP/ML , THKP-C/MLSPB , MKP , TKEP/L , TİKB , DKP , DK and MLKP ) with the aim of overthrowing the Turkish government of Recep Tayyip Erdoğan.

White Aryan Resistance.description: White Aryan Resistance (WAR) was a white supremacist and neo-Nazi organization in the United States, founded and formerly led by former Ku Klux Klan Grand Dragon Tom Metzger. It was based in Warsaw, Indiana, and described itself as an 'openly white-racist' organization. The group published a newspaper and produced a public-access cable television show. It is now defunct.

descriptions: Tension and disagreement arose between American Front and White Aryan Resistance after Aryan Woodstock.
edges.evidence_quote: Tension between AF and WAR increased soon after.

descriptions: American Front cooperated with White Aryan Resistance starting in 1988.
edges.evidence_quote: Heick began working with Tom Metzger 's White Aryan Resistance (WAR) in 1988.

descriptions: East Side White Pride allegedly had ties to WAR.
edges.evidence_quote: three white Aryan supremacists who were members of East Side White Pride, which allegedly had ties to WAR

descriptions: The Gramuglia were allied with the Gallico faction in the feud.
edges.evidence_quote: Per la prima fazione erano presenti anche i Frisina, i Mazzullo, i, Gramuglia e i Costantino

descriptions: OFB members were linked to NPK in a murder case.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2020, SJ, alongside four others (Sheareem Cookhorn, Tyrell 'Trills' Graham, Shane 'Sneakz' Lyons, and Ojay 'O'Sav' Hamilton), was given a life sentence with a minimum of 21 years, following a court case at the Old Bailey for the murder of Kamali 'K1' Gabbidon-Lynck in Wood Green. The group was said to be linked to the NPK.

descriptions: NPK and Shankstarz engaged in a fight in 2007.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2007, a fight occurred between members of the NPK and the Shankstarz, a gang from neighbouring Edmonton, following an attempted ambush on two Shankstarz members; the ambush was revenge for the attack of an NPK member at a club in Forest Gate.

descriptions: NPK is a split-off group from TMD.
edges.evidence_quote: NPK (Northumberland Park Killers), also known as Sin Squad, are a split-off group from TMD located in the Northumberland Park estate of Tottenham.

descriptions: Wood Green Mob killed a former NPK member.
edges.evidence_quote: On 3 February 2018, Kwabena Nelson, also known as Kobi and a former member of NPK, was stabbed to death by members of the Wood Green Mob (WGM) following them crashing into his car.

descriptions: Wood Green Young Guns attacked NPK members.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2011, Bienvenu Vangu, a member of the rival Wood Green Young Guns, attacked 2 members of NPK with an axe.

descriptions: NPK listed as a rival of Tottenham Mandem in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Northumberland Park Killers (NPK), Hackney Boys, London Field Boys (LFB)

descriptions: NPK splintered from TMD.
edges.evidence_quote: TMD also declined during this period, instead splintering off into various independent groups such as NPK (Northumberland Park Killers), Tiverton Mandem, and Chestnut Estate (CE, also known as Black Gang)

descriptions: The Baybaşin family commands and financially supports the Hackney Bombers.
edges.evidence_quote: The Hackney Bombers, a Kurdish gang in the United Kingdom under the command of Hüseyin Baybaşin, came to prominence following clashes with the Turkish-controlled Tottenham Turks gang. The Hackney Bombers, armed and financially supported by the Baybaşins, attacked a restaurant owned by Tottenham Turks with a group of masked thugs on motorbikes and AK-47s.

descriptions: The Hackney Bombers clashed with the Tottenham Turks gang.
edges.evidence_quote: On 29 May 2024, the Hackney Bombers, a Kurdish gang in the United Kingdom under the command of Hüseyin Baybaşin, came to prominence following clashes with the Turkish-controlled Tottenham Turks gang.

descriptions: TFN has links to the Grey Wolves.
edges.evidence_quote: Organizations such as Turkish Federation Netherlands (Turkse Federatie Nederland, TFN) and Turkish Islamic Federation (Turks Islamitische Federatie) have links to the Grey Wolves.

edges.target: Auto-Défense des Communautés Victimes de l'Ituri
descriptions: MAPI agreed to cooperate with ADCVI despite remaining independent.
edges.evidence_quote: Though MAPI leaders opted for independence, they agreed to cooperate with ADCVI and AFC-M23

descriptions: The Cataldo are allies of the Marafioti.
edges.evidence_quote: I Cataldo sono una potente 'ndrina di Cetraro , alleati dei Marafioti

descriptions: Cataldo 'ndrina is allied with the Marafioti family.
edges.evidence_quote: The clan, allied with the Marafioti family

descriptions: Big Circle Gang lists Red Wa as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: The Company, American Mafia, Red Wa, Fujian gangs, Wo Shing Wo, Menace of Destruction, Asian Boyz, MS-13, Netas

descriptions: The Red Wa are associated with the United Wa State Army.
edges.evidence_quote: They are known for cooperating with the Red Wa (who are associated with the United Wa State Army) for the trafficking and sale of narcotics.

Sangre Nueva Zeta.description: Mexican criminal syndicate formed in 2019 by former members of Los Zetas, founded by Roberto de los Santos de Jesús. Initially focused on fuel theft in Puebla's 'Red Triangle', it expanded into cocaine trafficking and extortion. The group allied with the Jalisco New Generation Cartel and is still active.

descriptions: Sangre Nueva Zeta is a successor faction of Los Zetas.
edges.evidence_quote: Estatus: Desarticulado, operan como facciones Cártel del Noreste , Zetas Vieja Escuela , Sangre Nueva Zeta, Los Talibanes (cártel ubicado en Zacatecas), Los Alemanes , Nueva Mafia Zeta.

descriptions: Sangre Nueva Zeta allied with Jalisco Cartel as an armed wing.
edges.evidence_quote: Another splinter group was formed also named Sangre Nueva Zeta (New Blood Zeta), allying themselves with the Jalisco Cartel as an armed wing.

descriptions: Sangre Nueva Zeta allied with CJNG to expand.
edges.evidence_quote: Sangre Nueva Zeta then expanded thanks to its alliance with the Jalisco New Generation Cartel

descriptions: Sangre Nueva Zeta is composed of former Los Zetas members.
edges.evidence_quote: The organization is made up of former members of Los Zetas.

descriptions: APC created self-defense forces in response to OPC's militarization, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: La APC tiene un lema 'para preservar la indivisibilidad del país'. El grupo creó unas autodefensas en respuesta a la militarización de los yorubas del OPC.

descriptions: Spanish Cobras and Two Sixers cooperated to form SGD.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1989, leaders of the Spanish Cobras, the Maniac Latin Disciples, and the Two Sixers met to establish the Spanish Growth and Development (SGD), a structured organization.

descriptions: The PKK cooperated with DKP as part of the Peoples' United Revolutionary Movement.
edges.evidence_quote: In March 2016, the PKK helped to launch the Peoples' United Revolutionary Movement with nine other Kurdish and Turkish revolutionary leftist, socialist and communist groups (including the TKP/ML , THKP-C/MLSPB , MKP , TKEP/L , TİKB , DKP , DK and MLKP ) with the aim of overthrowing the Turkish government of Recep Tayyip Erdoğan.

descriptions: The Gitans MC fought a turf war with the Atomes MC from 1973 to 1975.
edges.evidence_quote: Tensions between both groups eventually erupted in 1973, when a violent turf war commenced.

descriptions: The Gitans and Atomes agreed to share the drug market, ending the war.
edges.evidence_quote: both gangs reluctantly reached an agreement to share the city's drug market
